flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Washington and Lee University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.4k → $68.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Washington and Lee University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.4k → $68.0k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Washington and Lee University are 80% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($94.8k vs $52.7k).
